---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the template
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

## Related workstream

Which workstream from the [implementation plan](../../implementation-plan.md) does this relate to?
<!-- e.g. Workstream E (DAST / ZAP) -->

## Additional context

Anything else that helps explain the request.
